# ComicDeck
> SwiftUI-based iOS comic library, discovery, download, and reading app.

## Core Files
- [README.md]: Project overview, build entry point, documentation links
- [docs/README.md]: Documentation index
- [docs/ARCHITECTURE.md]: Layering, ownership, and deliberate constraints
- [docs/USER_GUIDE.md]: User-facing workflows and expected behavior
- [docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md]: Recovery paths for common failures
- [docs/LOCALIZATION.md]: Localization workflow and boundaries
- [docs/RELEASE_CHECKLIST.md]: Pre-release validation checklist

## Key Concepts
- Layered architecture: `App -> Features -> Runtime -> Core`, with `Features -> Core` as the only shortcut
- Offline model: active queue state and offline library state are intentionally separate
- Backup boundary: local/WebDAV backup covers library data and settings, not offline chapter files
- Localization model: app-owned UI uses semantic keys in `Localizable.xcstrings` via `AppLocalization`
